hooks.command: sh -c 'for d in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/bitfab-internal/bitfab/local" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache"/*/bitfab/*; do [ -x "$d/scripts/session-start" ] && exec "$d/scripts/session-start"; done; exit 0'

sh -c 'for d in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/bitfab-internal/bitfab/local" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache"/*/bitfab/*; do [ -x "$d/scripts/capture-hook-background" ] && exec "$d/scripts/capture-hook-background" PreToolUse; done; exit 0'

sh -c 'for d in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/bitfab-internal/bitfab/local" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache"/*/bitfab/*; do [ -x "$d/scripts/capture-hook" ] && exec "$d/scripts/capture-hook" Stop; done; exit 0'
